findings.title: Unconditional closesocket on invalid socket handle
findings.rationale: Calling ::closesocket with socket_ == INVALID_SOCKET (per Windows API) is undefined behavior. The diff removed the necessary validity check present in the original code, risking undefined behavior when socket_ is already closed.
findings.suggestion: Restore the socket validity check before calling closesocket

evidence.ref: Windows API documentation: 'The socket handle must be valid' for closesocket
Original code contained necessary validity check (line 52-53 in diff)
